description: Canonical role templates map each persona to its minimum permit set; assigning a template applies the whole set in one action.

cases.name: a front-desk permit answers scheduling from its template basis (AC-1/AC-6)
assigning a role ends every prior active assignment in the SAME act (AC-7/EX-4)
a justified, approved, time-boxed override lands review-flagged (AC-8)
